title: ClearBank Secures MiCA License to Support Digital Asset Push
message_html: ClearBank Secures MiCA License to Support Digital Asset Push ...
snippet: Real-time clearing and embedded banking provider ClearBank has become a Crypto Asset Service Provider (CASP) under the European Union’s Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA).
